headline: Verizon (VZ) Forms $4 Billion BT Venture For Global Enterprise Customers
summary: BT Group and Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) are combining their international enterprise units into a jointly owned platform. The joint venture is expected to serve thousands of global business customers with connectivity, cloud, and AI services. The combined entity is projected to generate about US$4b in annual revenue once fully operational. Verizon plans to prioritize domestic investments while maintaining an international footprint through its stake in the new venture. For Verizon...
